name: Banana-Chocolate Bundt Cake
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup Dutch processed cocoa powder (like Ghiradelli)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Grease and flour a 12-cup Bundt pan or a 10-inch angel food tube pan.
3. Sift together the flour, cocoa powder, salt, and baking soda.
- Mash the bananas with a fork.
- Cream the butter and sugar until light.
- Add sour cream and mashed bananas to the butter and sugar mixture.
- Beat the eggs until well blended.
4. In four stages, beat the eggs into the butter-sugar-sour cream-banana mixture.
5. Blend in half of the flour-cocoa mixture.
6. Stir in the milk and remaining flour.
7. Mix only until evenly blended; be careful not to overmix the batter.
8. Spoon the batter into the prepared pan and bake for 30 minutes on the lowest level of the oven rack.
9. Rotate the cake, moving the back to the front, and continue baking until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean (about 30 more minutes).
10. Let cool in the pan for 5 minutes on a rack before turning out onto a rack and cooling further before serving.
